api_scenarios.name: ingest-batch-10-c1
api_scenarios.description: Single connection, small batches (10 events) — latency baseline

api_scenarios.name: ingest-batch-100-c10
api_scenarios.description: 10 concurrent connections, medium batches (100 events) — typical SDK flush

api_scenarios.name: ingest-batch-1000-c10
api_scenarios.description: 10 concurrent connections, max batch size (1000 events)

api_scenarios.name: sustained-500eps-5min
api_scenarios.description: Sustained load for 5 minutes — memory leak detection

api_scenarios.name: burst-5000-events
api_scenarios.description: 5000 events in a burst — verify recovery, no dropped batches

api_scenarios.name: multi-tenant-10x100
api_scenarios.description: 10 concurrent tenants at 100 events each — tenant isolation under load

api_scenarios.name: clusterer-down
api_scenarios.description: Sustained load with clusterer unavailable — degradation impact on throughput

transport_scenarios.name: transport-throughput
transport_scenarios.description: Max events/sec through SDK to a fast mock API (0ms response)

transport_scenarios.name: transport-slow-api
transport_scenarios.description: SDK behavior when API responds slowly (200ms) — backpressure

transport_scenarios.name: transport-api-down
transport_scenarios.description: SDK behavior when API is unreachable — drop handling
